name: agentic-commerce-platform
description: Policy-aware LLM routing and payment orchestration with onchain USDC receipts.

scripts.bootstrap: npm install && npm install --workspace=router-backend && npm install --workspace=provider-wrappers && npm install --workspace=web && npm install --workspace=shared
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --workspace=router-backend && npm install --workspace=provider-wrappers && npm install --workspace=web && npm install --workspace=shared
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run build --workspace=router-backend && npm run build --workspace=provider-wrappers && npm run build --workspace=web
scripts.build:all: npm run build --workspace=shared && npm run build --workspace=router-backend && npm run build --workspace=provider-wrappers && npm run build --workspace=web
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=router-backend" "npm run dev --workspace=provider-wrappers" "npm run dev --workspace=web"
